headline: What Aptiv (APTV)'s US$1.6 Billion Notes-Funded Versigent Spin-Off Means For Shareholders
summary: In early March 2026, Aptiv PLC’s subsidiaries Cyprium Corporation and Cyprium Holdings Luxembourg priced an upsized US$1.60 billion senior notes offering, helping fund a dividend to Aptiv and support the planned spin-off of its Electrical Distribution Systems segment into a new company, Versigent Limited. This move signals a significant reshaping of Aptiv’s business mix, as it prepares to separate a large wiring and distribution operation to further emphasize software and advanced...
